log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:8+3=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:17+-2=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:6+-2=4 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (55ft). Javelin at Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist.
→ Javelin: [d20:10+6=16 vs AC 20] MISS.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Ogre --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 11 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Ogre (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (55ft). Javelin at Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist.
→ Javelin: [d20:14+6=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 8 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist HP: 51/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15
REASONING: Throwing rock at Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist (flying).
→ Rock: [d20:14+9=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 37 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist HP: 14/59
REASONING: Can't reach melee (60ft). Javelin at Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist.
→ Javelin: [d20:17+6=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 11 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist HP: 3/59
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist --- HP: 3/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (3/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (55ft). Javelin at Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist.
→ Javelin: [d20:15+6=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 8 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist HP: -5/59
→ Concentration save: [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
